items.project_definition: RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ utilizing a standardized envelope containing data, meta, and errors.
httpx component utilized within pytest to perform non-blocking request validation.
Structural section identifier designating the security and access control specifications.

items.contextual_anchor: III. API Contract and Response Shape
items.project_definition: Structural section identifier designating the interface exchange format and response structure.
Structural section identifier designating the persistence layer and data retrieval constraints.
The mandatory lightweight data-interchange format for all system responses.
Compact, URL-safe means of representing claims to be transferred between two parties, with a 15-minute access and 7-day refresh lifespan.
The most recent date of modification for the governing technical document.
The exclusive mechanism for performing database interactions, prohibiting the use of direct query strings.
Version 16 relational database engine used for primary storage and testing instances.
The mandatory runtime environment and language specification for all project implementations.
The specific Python library provided by the external transactional mail platform for message delivery.
Raw structured query language, the use of which is strictly forbidden in favor of the mapped persistence layer.
The toolkit used for database abstraction, strictly requiring asynchronous execution patterns.
